eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Rogers, OK; at 6:08 PM on MAY 25, 2019 Effective until 7:08 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
VERDIGRIS RIVER LEVELS ARE RISING AND DANGEROUS FLOODING IMPACTS ARE EXPECTED IN LOW LYING AREAS NEAR THE RIVER IN ROGERS COUNTY.

RESIDENTS IN THESE AREAS SHOULD ACT NOW TO EVACUATE AWAY FROM LOW LYING AREAS AND STAY AWAY FROM RIVER BANKS. A SHELTER FOR EVACUEES IS OPEN AT CROSSTOWN CHURCH OF CHRIST IN TULSA. LOCATED AT 3400 EAST ADMIRAL PLACE. IF YOU HAVE AN EMERGENCY OR REQUIRE ASSISTANCE WITH EVACUATION, PLEASE CALL 9-1-1.
